name: create_record
description: Create a new contract record directly in the Ironclad repository. Use this for contracts that were executed outside of Ironclad workflows (e.g., legacy contracts or third-party signed documents) that you want to track and manage centrally.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The display name of the contract record.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: Key-value pairs of record metadata (counterparty name, contract value, dates, etc.).

parameters.name: attachments
parameters.description: Array of file attachment objects with name and downloadUrl or base64 content.
